Our Philosophy

Not a cookie.
A Statement.

Cookie Cartel started with one obsession: the perfect New York cookie. Thick. Gooey in the centre. Crisp at the edge. Brown-buttered, rested 24 hours, loaded with couverture chocolate.

We brought that obsession to Bangkok. For the people who refuse to settle.

The Menu

Choose Your Vice

Signature · Most Popular
The Cartel Classic
Brown butter dough, rested 24 hours. 70% Valrhona dark chocolate chunks. Finished with French fleur de sel. This is the one that started everything.
฿180 per cookie

The Double Cross
Double chocolate dough, loaded with milk and dark couverture chunks. A molten centre that doesn't apologise. Dangerously rich.

The Craft

The Art Behind
the Cartel

We don't do batches. We don't do mass production. Every cookie is hand-portioned, pressed, and baked to order — so what arrives at your door is still warm from the oven.

Our dough rests for a full 24 hours. We use French brown butter, high-grade couverture chocolate, and sea salt pyramid flakes on every single cookie. No shortcuts. No compromises.

This is Bangkok. Standards are high. Cookies should be higher.

Valrhona 70% Fleur de Sel Brown Butter 24h Rest Hand Pressed Callebaut White
Master Baker
Bangkok
The Talent

Meet
Michelle Tan

Michelle is the obsessive mind behind every Cookie Cartel recipe. Trained in New York, based in Bangkok, and utterly incapable of settling for anything less than perfect.

She spent three years reverse-engineering the cookies she fell in love with on the streets of Manhattan — refining the brown butter ratios, the chocolate-to-dough balance, the exact rest time — before she was satisfied enough to put the Cartel name on them.

Every cookie you eat is her recipe. Her standard. Her obsession.

New York Trained 3 Years R&D 12 Signature Recipes Bangkok Based
